Short Description: ESXi host is not responding to vCenter
Label: ESXi Host Failure
Resolution Notes: ESXi host lost connectivity to vCenter. Investigated and found management network NIC had failed. Replaced NIC and re-added host to vCenter. All VMs resumed normal operation.

Short Description: Virtual machines not starting on ESXi host
Label: ESXi Host Failure
Resolution Notes: VMs failed to power on due to ESXi host running out of memory resources. Migrated non-critical VMs to alternate host via vMotion. Resources freed and affected VMs restarted successfully.

Short Description: ESXi datastore showing as inaccessible
Label: ESXi Storage Issue
Resolution Notes: Datastore became inaccessible due to lost SAN path. Rescanned HBAs, restored storage path and remounted the datastore. VMs resumed normal disk I/O.

Short Description: ESXi host CPU usage at 100%, VMs unresponsive
Label: ESXi Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: CPU ready times were extremely high. Identified a runaway VM consuming excessive CPU. VM was powered off and restarted with CPU limits applied. Host performance normalized.

Short Description: ESXi Purple Screen of Death (PSOD) observed
Label: ESXi Host Failure
Resolution Notes: ESXi host crashed with PSOD. Collected vmkernel logs and memory dump. Root cause identified as a faulty third-party driver. Updated driver to vendor-approved version and rebooted host. No further PSOD observed.

Short Description: Cannot connect to ESXi host via SSH
Label: ESXi Access Issue
Resolution Notes: SSH service was found disabled on the ESXi host. Enabled SSH via DCUI console and verified firewall rules permitted SSH traffic. Remote access restored successfully.

Short Description: ESXi NTP sync failure causing time drift
Label: ESXi Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Time drift detected on ESXi host causing authentication issues. Reconfigured NTP client to point to correct internal NTP server and restarted the NTP service. Time synchronized correctly.

Short Description: ESXi host disconnected from vCenter unexpectedly
Label: ESXi Host Failure
Resolution Notes: Host disconnected due to vCenter service account password expiry. Reset the service account password, reconnected the host to vCenter, and configured the account to not expire.

Short Description: Snapshot consolidation needed on ESXi VM
Label: ESXi Storage Issue
Resolution Notes: VM snapshot chain was growing and impacting datastore space. Consolidated snapshots via vCenter snapshot manager. Datastore space reclaimed and VM performance improved.

Short Description: ESXi host entering maintenance mode unexpectedly
Label: ESXi Host Failure
Resolution Notes: HA cluster triggered maintenance mode due to repeated heartbeat failures. Investigated and found a misconfigured HA admission control policy. Policy corrected and host returned to active state.

Short Description: ESXi vMotion failing between hosts
Label: ESXi Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: vMotion migrations were failing due to incompatible CPU feature sets between hosts. Applied EVC mode to cluster to mask CPU differences. vMotion completed successfully after configuration change.

Short Description: ESXi host running out of disk space on VMFS datastore
Label: ESXi Storage Issue
Resolution Notes: VMFS datastore reached 95% capacity. Identified and deleted orphaned VMDK files and old snapshots. Expanded datastore using available storage pool. Space utilization brought below 70%.

Short Description: ESXi virtual switch losing network packets
Label: ESXi Network Issue
Resolution Notes: Packet loss traced to misconfigured MTU settings on the virtual switch. Aligned MTU settings across vSwitch, physical switch, and VM NICs. Network packet loss eliminated.

Short Description: ESXi host license expired, VMs powered off
Label: ESXi Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: ESXi license had expired causing VMs to power off. Applied valid license key via vCenter license manager. VMs restarted and operations resumed. License renewal process flagged for proactive monitoring.

Short Description: ESXi VM showing high disk latency
Label: ESXi Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: High disk latency identified on a VM due to storage I/O contention. Storage I/O control was enabled and disk shares adjusted. Latency dropped to acceptable levels after configuration.

Short Description: ESXi host hardware sensor showing warning alerts
Label: ESXi Hardware Alert
Resolution Notes: Hardware health sensors reported fan failure warning on ESXi host. Coordinated with data center team to replace failed fan unit. Hardware health status returned to green.

Short Description: ESXi VM network adapter disconnected after migration
Label: ESXi Network Issue
Resolution Notes: VM network adapter was disconnected after live migration due to port group name mismatch between hosts. Port group renamed to match across all hosts. VM network restored.

Short Description: ESXi syslog not forwarding to SIEM
Label: ESXi Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Syslog forwarding was disabled after a host reboot. Reconfigured syslog target in ESXi advanced settings and opened required firewall ports. Log forwarding to SIEM confirmed active.

Short Description: ESXi VM backup failing with snapshot error
Label: ESXi Storage Issue
Resolution Notes: Backup job failing due to stale snapshot locks on the VM. Quiesced the VM, removed stale delta files manually and unlocked the snapshot. Backup job completed successfully on retry.

Short Description: ESXi host memory balloon driver causing VM slowdown
Label: ESXi Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Memory ballooning was active due to host memory overcommitment. Added physical RAM to host and adjusted VM memory reservations. Balloon driver activity ceased and VM performance normalized.

Short Description: Windows Server 2019 failing to boot after patch
Label: Wintel Patching Issue
Resolution Notes: Server failed to boot following a Windows update. Booted into WinRE, used DISM to repair corrupted system files caused by a failed patch. Server rebooted successfully and patch rollback applied.

Short Description: Windows Server blue screen (BSOD) on production server
Label: Wintel Server Crash
Resolution Notes: BSOD with SYSTEM_SERVICE_EXCEPTION error observed. Analyzed minidump file and identified a faulty NIC driver as the cause. Updated driver to latest certified version. No further BSOD recorded.

Short Description: CPU usage at 100% on Windows Server
Label: Wintel Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Task Manager identified a runaway Windows Search Indexing process consuming all CPU. Indexing service restarted and scope reduced. CPU utilization returned to normal levels.

Short Description: Windows Server disk space critically low on C drive
Label: Wintel Storage Issue
Resolution Notes: C drive at 98% capacity. Cleaned up Windows update cache, old log files, and temp directories using Disk Cleanup and manual deletion. Freed 25GB. Monitoring alert threshold set at 85%.

Short Description: Remote Desktop Services not accepting connections
Label: Wintel Access Issue
Resolution Notes: RDS listener was in a broken state. Restarted Remote Desktop Services and TermService. RDP listener re-enabled and verified connectivity from multiple clients. Access restored.

Short Description: Windows Server event log showing critical disk errors
Label: Wintel Storage Issue
Resolution Notes: Event Viewer showed disk I/O errors on a data volume. Ran chkdsk /f /r on the affected volume after scheduling downtime. Bad sectors marked and file system repaired. Disk health monitored post-fix.

Short Description: Active Directory replication failing between domain controllers
Label: Wintel AD Issue
Resolution Notes: Replication failure detected using repadmin /showrepl. Identified USN rollback on one DC. Forcibly demoted the affected DC, cleaned metadata using ntdsutil, and re-promoted it. Replication restored.

Short Description: Windows Server time sync failing, causing Kerberos errors
Label: Wintel Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Kerberos authentication failures traced to time drift exceeding 5 minutes. Reconfigured W32tm to sync with domain hierarchy. Time corrected and Kerberos authentication restored across all services.

Short Description: IIS web server returning 503 Service Unavailable
Label: Wintel Application Issue
Resolution Notes: IIS application pool had stopped due to rapid fail protection triggered by repeated crashes. Identified memory leak in web application. App pool recycled with memory limit set. Engaged dev team for permanent fix.

Short Description: Windows Server network interface not responding
Label: Wintel Network Issue
Resolution Notes: NIC became unresponsive due to driver hang. Disabled and re-enabled the network adapter remotely via iDRAC. NIC driver updated to latest stable version. Network connectivity fully restored.

Short Description: Windows Server failing to apply Group Policy
Label: Wintel AD Issue
Resolution Notes: gpresult showed GPO processing errors. Found SYSVOL replication was broken due to DFS-R service stopped. Restarted DFS-R, forced replication with dfsrdiag and confirmed GPO applying correctly.

Short Description: Windows Update stuck at 35% on server
Label: Wintel Patching Issue
Resolution Notes: Windows Update process hung during installation. Stopped Windows Update service, cleared SoftwareDistribution folder, restarted service and re-initiated update. Update completed successfully.

Short Description: Windows Server RAM usage at 95%, system sluggish
Label: Wintel Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Memory usage near capacity traced to a memory leak in a third-party monitoring agent. Agent restarted and vendor notified. Temporary fix applied via scheduled task to recycle agent nightly pending patch.

Short Description: SQL Server service not starting on Windows Server
Label: Wintel Application Issue
Resolution Notes: SQL Server service failed to start due to corrupted tempdb files. Deleted tempdb files and restarted SQL Server in minimal config mode. tempdb rebuilt automatically. SQL Server returned to normal operation.

Short Description: Windows Server firewall blocking application traffic
Label: Wintel Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Windows Firewall was blocking inbound traffic on a required application port after a policy push. Created targeted inbound firewall rule via GPO for the affected port. Application connectivity restored.

Short Description: Server certificate expired causing HTTPS failures
Label: Wintel Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: SSL certificate on IIS had expired. Generated CSR, obtained renewed certificate from internal CA, and bound new certificate to the HTTPS site binding. HTTPS connections restored across all clients.

Short Description: Windows Server event ID 7034 service crash loop
Label: Wintel Server Crash
Resolution Notes: Service crash loop identified in Event Viewer. Corrupt service binary identified after comparing file hash. Redeployed service binary from backup. Service stabilized and crash loop resolved.

Short Description: Scheduled task not running on Windows Server
Label: Wintel Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Scheduled task failing due to service account password expiry. Updated task credentials with refreshed service account password and verified task ran successfully on next schedule.

Short Description: Windows Server showing high page file usage
Label: Wintel Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Excessive paging due to insufficient physical RAM and a memory-hungry application. Extended page file size as interim measure and submitted request to add 32GB RAM. Application vendor engaged for optimization.

Short Description: Print spooler service crashing on Windows print server
Label: Wintel Application Issue
Resolution Notes: Print spooler crashing repeatedly due to a corrupt print driver. Cleared all jobs from the spooler queue, removed faulty driver, and reinstalled certified driver. Spooler stable after restart.

Short Description: Windows Server losing domain trust relationship
Label: Wintel AD Issue
Resolution Notes: Secure channel between server and domain broken. Used netdom resetpwd and Test-ComputerSecureChannel -Repair in PowerShell to restore trust. Server reconnected to domain without requiring a rejoin.

Short Description: WSUS not distributing updates to Windows servers
Label: Wintel Patching Issue
Resolution Notes: WSUS server IIS app pool had crashed. Restarted app pool and ran WSUS server cleanup wizard to remove obsolete updates. Clients successfully synced and received pending updates within the next cycle.

Short Description: Windows Server DNS resolution failing intermittently
Label: Wintel Network Issue
Resolution Notes: DNS cache corruption identified on primary DNS server. Cleared DNS cache using dnscmd /clearcache and restarted DNS service. Secondary DNS configured as fallback. Resolution failures ceased.

Short Description: Event log full, server generating warnings
Label: Wintel Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Security event log was full and overwrite was disabled causing audit failures. Increased log size and enabled archiving of old logs to a network share. Log rotation policy documented and applied via GPO.

Short Description: Windows Server unable to reach domain controller
Label: Wintel AD Issue
Resolution Notes: Server could not reach DC due to a static DNS entry pointing to a decommissioned DC. Updated DNS settings to point to active domain controllers. Domain connectivity and authentication restored.

Short Description: Hyper-V virtual switch connectivity lost on Windows Server
Label: Wintel Network Issue
Resolution Notes: Hyper-V external virtual switch lost connectivity after Windows update modified NIC binding order. Re-bound the external vSwitch to the correct physical adapter. VM network traffic restored.

Short Description: Windows Server backup failing with VSS error
Label: Wintel Storage Issue
Resolution Notes: VSS writer errors prevented backup completion. Identified stale VSS snapshots consuming shadow storage. Deleted stale snapshots, restarted VSS writers using vssadmin. Backup completed successfully on retry.

Short Description: Server running Windows Server 2016 experiencing random reboots
Label: Wintel Server Crash
Resolution Notes: Random reboots linked to hardware memory errors via Windows Memory Diagnostic. Faulty DIMM identified using iDRAC hardware logs. DIMM replaced by data center team. No further unexpected reboots observed.

Short Description: Windows Server DHCP scope exhausted
Label: Wintel Network Issue
Resolution Notes: DHCP scope had run out of available leases due to stale reservations. Cleared expired leases, reclaimed unused reservations, and extended the scope range. DHCP service resumed issuing addresses normally.

Short Description: Antivirus causing high I/O on Windows Server
Label: Wintel Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Antivirus real-time scanning was scanning database files causing severe I/O bottleneck. Added database file paths and SQL processes to AV exclusion list per vendor best practices. I/O normalized immediately.

Short Description: Cannot log into ePIMS application
Label: ePIMS Access Issue
Resolution Notes: User unable to log in due to account lockout after multiple failed attempts. IT unlocked account in Active Directory and reset password. User successfully logged in after credential reset.

Short Description: ePIMS session timing out too quickly
Label: ePIMS Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Session timeout was set to 5 minutes in ePIMS application settings. IT coordinated with application admin to extend session timeout to 30 minutes per hospital policy. Users confirmed issue resolved.

Short Description: ePIMS login page not loading
Label: ePIMS Application Error
Resolution Notes: ePIMS web portal was inaccessible due to IIS app pool crash on application server. App pool restarted and health monitoring configured to auto-recycle on failure. Login page restored.

Short Description: ePIMS single sign-on not working
Label: ePIMS Access Issue
Resolution Notes: SSO token validation was failing due to expired SAML certificate on identity provider. Renewed SAML certificate and updated metadata on ePIMS SP configuration. SSO authentication restored.

Short Description: User locked out of ePIMS after password change
Label: ePIMS Access Issue
Resolution Notes: Password change in Active Directory did not sync to ePIMS due to AAD Connect delay. Forced delta sync on AAD Connect. User credentials updated in ePIMS and login confirmed successful.

Short Description: ePIMS not recognizing user role after department transfer
Label: ePIMS Access Issue
Resolution Notes: User role in ePIMS was tied to old department group. Updated AD group membership and refreshed ePIMS role mapping. User now has correct permissions for new department workflows.

Short Description: Multiple users cannot access ePIMS simultaneously
Label: ePIMS Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Concurrent user limit was reached on ePIMS application server. Investigated licensing and confirmed concurrent session cap. Added additional application node to load balancer. All users able to connect.

Short Description: Drug not found when searching in ePIMS formulary
Label: ePIMS Data Issue
Resolution Notes: Drug was not listed in the formulary due to a missing NDC code entry. Pharmacist verified drug details and IT team added the drug record to the ePIMS formulary database. Drug searchable after cache refresh.

Short Description: ePIMS showing incorrect drug dosage information
Label: ePIMS Data Issue
Resolution Notes: Incorrect dosage was found in the drug master record. Coordinated with pharmacy team to verify correct dosage from reference sources. Drug record corrected in ePIMS and audit log updated.

Short Description: Duplicate drug entries appearing in ePIMS
Label: ePIMS Data Issue
Resolution Notes: Data migration from legacy system had created duplicate NDC entries. Ran deduplication script against drug master table after pharmacy validation. Duplicate records merged and removed.

Short Description: ePIMS not flagging drug interaction alerts
Label: ePIMS Application Error
Resolution Notes: Drug interaction engine had a configuration flag disabled after a recent patch. Re-enabled interaction checking in ePIMS clinical settings. Verified alerts firing correctly with pharmacy test cases.

Short Description: Controlled substance dispensing not recording in ePIMS
Label: ePIMS Compliance Issue
Resolution Notes: Audit logging for controlled substances was broken due to a database trigger failure. Restored trigger from backup script. Tested dispensing workflow end-to-end. All dispensing events now logging correctly.

Short Description: ePIMS formulary update not reflecting after import
Label: ePIMS Data Issue
Resolution Notes: Formulary import job completed but changes were not visible due to caching. Cleared application cache and restarted formulary sync service. Updated formulary visible to all users.

Short Description: Drug allergy alert not appearing during prescription entry
Label: ePIMS Application Error
Resolution Notes: Allergy checking module was bypassed due to a misconfigured workflow rule. Identified and corrected the rule in ePIMS clinical decision support settings. Allergy alerts tested and confirmed working.

Short Description: ePIMS barcode scanner not reading medication barcodes
Label: ePIMS Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: Barcode scanner driver was incompatible with latest ePIMS client update. Rolled back scanner driver to certified version listed in ePIMS hardware compatibility guide. Scanning functional after rollback.

Short Description: Cannot submit prescription order in ePIMS
Label: ePIMS Workflow Issue
Resolution Notes: Prescription submission was failing due to a mandatory field validation error not visible to users. UI bug identified where required field was hidden. Patch applied by vendor hotfix. Order submission restored.

Short Description: ePIMS prescription order stuck in pending status
Label: ePIMS Workflow Issue
Resolution Notes: Order processing queue had stalled due to a failed database transaction. Database transaction log cleared and queue processor restarted. Pending orders processed and status updated correctly.

Short Description: ePIMS not printing prescription labels
Label: ePIMS Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: Label printer queue was full and print spooler had stopped. Cleared print queue, restarted spooler service, and verified printer connectivity. Label printing confirmed working after test print.

Short Description: Physician order entry failing in ePIMS
Label: ePIMS Application Error
Resolution Notes: CPOE module was throwing a null reference error on order submission. Vendor identified a bug introduced in recent release. Emergency patch deployed to ePIMS application server. Order entry functional.

Short Description: ePIMS medication administration record not updating
Label: ePIMS Workflow Issue
Resolution Notes: MAR updates were not persisting due to a database deadlock on the medication_admin table. Identified and killed blocking sessions. Table index rebuilt to reduce deadlock frequency. MAR updates working correctly.

Short Description: Discharge prescription not generating in ePIMS
Label: ePIMS Workflow Issue
Resolution Notes: Discharge workflow rule was referencing a deleted template. Restored discharge prescription template from version control and updated workflow reference. Discharge prescriptions generating correctly.

Short Description: ePIMS not sending prescription to pharmacy queue
Label: ePIMS Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: Integration service between ePIMS and pharmacy dispensing system had stopped. Service restarted and HL7 message queue flushed. Prescriptions flowing to pharmacy queue confirmed via test order.

Short Description: Wrong pharmacy location assigned on ePIMS order
Label: ePIMS Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Default pharmacy mapping for the ward was incorrectly configured after a ward relocation. Updated pharmacy-to-ward mapping in ePIMS administration settings. Orders now routing to correct pharmacy.

Short Description: ePIMS monthly dispensing report not generating
Label: ePIMS Reporting Issue
Resolution Notes: Scheduled report job was failing due to a timeout querying large dataset. Added database index on dispensing_date column and optimized report query. Report now generates within 3 minutes.

Short Description: ePIMS report showing incorrect patient medication history
Label: ePIMS Data Issue
Resolution Notes: Patient records were merged incorrectly during an MPI reconciliation. Unmerged affected patient records, corrected medication history, and re-ran MPI with stricter matching rules.

Short Description: ePIMS audit report missing controlled substance entries
Label: ePIMS Compliance Issue
Resolution Notes: Audit report query was excluding a transaction type code added in last release. Updated report query to include new transaction code. Regenerated missing audit entries from transaction logs.

Short Description: Cannot export ePIMS report to Excel
Label: ePIMS Reporting Issue
Resolution Notes: Excel export function was broken due to a missing ACE database driver on the application server. Installed Microsoft Access Database Engine 2016 Redistributable. Excel export confirmed working.

Short Description: ePIMS dashboard not loading performance metrics
Label: ePIMS Reporting Issue
Resolution Notes: Dashboard metrics service had crashed due to memory exhaustion. Restarted metrics service with increased heap allocation. Identified and tuned two heavy aggregation queries reducing memory usage by 60%.

Short Description: ePIMS inventory report showing negative stock levels
Label: ePIMS Data Issue
Resolution Notes: Negative stock values caused by a sync error between ePIMS and the warehouse management system. Re-ran full inventory reconciliation job. Stock levels corrected and sync schedule validated.

Short Description: ePIMS application running very slowly
Label: ePIMS Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Slow performance traced to missing index on high-traffic prescription_orders table. Created composite index after confirming with DBA. Application response times improved from 12 seconds to under 2 seconds.

Short Description: ePIMS application server down, all users affected
Label: ePIMS Outage
Resolution Notes: Application server crashed due to disk space exhaustion from unrotated log files. Cleared old logs, freed 40GB disk space, and restarted application services. Log rotation policy implemented via scheduled task.

Short Description: ePIMS timing out during peak morning hours
Label: ePIMS Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Database connection pool exhausted during peak usage. Increased connection pool size in ePIMS configuration and added read replica for reporting queries. Peak hour timeouts eliminated.

Short Description: ePIMS portal intermittently unavailable
Label: ePIMS Outage
Resolution Notes: Load balancer health check was incorrectly marking healthy nodes as down. Corrected health check endpoint URL in load balancer config. All nodes shown as healthy and portal availability restored.

Short Description: ePIMS database server high CPU causing application lag
Label: ePIMS Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Identified a missing query plan causing full table scans on the medication_history table. Updated statistics and forced query plan recompile. CPU usage dropped from 95% to 35% during peak hours.

Short Description: ePIMS crashing when generating large patient lists
Label: ePIMS Application Error
Resolution Notes: Application ran out of memory when generating lists over 500 patients. Implemented server-side pagination in the patient list query. Memory usage stabilized and large lists load without crashes.

Short Description: ePIMS not receiving ADT messages from HIS
Label: ePIMS Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: HL7 ADT feed from Hospital Information System had stopped due to a certificate expiry on the integration engine. Renewed certificate and restarted Mirth Connect interface engine. ADT messages flowing normally.

Short Description: ePIMS lab results not displaying in patient record
Label: ePIMS Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: LIS to ePIMS HL7 ORU interface had a mapping error after a LIS upgrade changed segment structure. Updated HL7 message transformation map in integration engine. Lab results populating correctly in ePIMS.

Short Description: ePIMS not updating patient discharge status
Label: ePIMS Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: ADT A03 discharge messages were being dropped due to a patient ID mismatch between HIS and ePIMS. Corrected MRN mapping in integration layer. Discharge status now updating correctly in real time.

Short Description: ePIMS electronic prescribing not transmitting to external pharmacy
Label: ePIMS Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: e-prescribing interface to external pharmacy network was rejected due to outdated NCPDP script version. Upgraded ePIMS e-prescribing module to NCPDP SCRIPT 2017071. Transmissions confirmed successful.

Short Description: ePIMS billing codes not exporting to finance system
Label: ePIMS Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: Billing export job was failing due to a schema change in the finance system API. Updated API payload mapping in ePIMS billing export configuration. Billing codes now exporting correctly to finance system.

Short Description: ePIMS new user account not set up correctly
Label: ePIMS Access Issue
Resolution Notes: New pharmacist account was missing role assignments needed for dispensing workflows. Added correct role profiles in ePIMS user administration. User confirmed all required modules accessible.

Short Description: ePIMS user permissions too broad after role change
Label: ePIMS Access Issue
Resolution Notes: User retained old role permissions after promotion. Removed legacy role, applied new role profile, and conducted access review. Permissions now aligned with least-privilege policy.

Short Description: ePIMS ward configuration missing after system migration
Label: ePIMS Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Ward configuration data was not included in migration scope. Re-created ward profiles, bed assignments, and pharmacy mappings in ePIMS admin console. All ward workflows validated by pharmacy team.

Short Description: ePIMS notification emails not being sent to pharmacists
Label: ePIMS Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: SMTP relay configuration was pointing to decommissioned mail server. Updated SMTP settings in ePIMS notification configuration to new mail relay. Test notifications delivered successfully.

Short Description: ePIMS clinical alerts not appearing on screen
Label: ePIMS Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Pop-up blocker on clinical workstations was suppressing ePIMS alert windows. Added ePIMS URL to browser trusted sites and disabled pop-up blocking for the domain. Alerts displaying correctly on all workstations.

Short Description: Patient medication history missing in ePIMS
Label: ePIMS Data Issue
Resolution Notes: Historical medication records not migrated for a subset of patients from legacy system. Identified affected patient cohort and re-ran targeted data migration. Medication history validated by pharmacy and confirmed complete.

Short Description: ePIMS patient record showing wrong allergies
Label: ePIMS Data Issue
Resolution Notes: Allergy records were incorrectly merged during patient de-duplication. Reversed merge, restored individual allergy records from audit log, and reviewed all affected patients. Records corrected and clinically validated.

Short Description: ePIMS not enforcing controlled substance two-pharmacist sign-off
Label: ePIMS Compliance Issue
Resolution Notes: Workflow rule for dual sign-off was disabled by a configuration change during an upgrade. Rule re-enabled and tested with pharmacy team. Dual sign-off enforced correctly for all controlled substance transactions.

Short Description: ePIMS audit log not capturing user access events
Label: ePIMS Compliance Issue
Resolution Notes: Audit logging database insert was failing silently due to a full audit table partition. Added new partition, archived old audit data to cold storage, and verified logging resumed. Audit retention policy reviewed.

Short Description: ePIMS not flagging expired medications during dispensing
Label: ePIMS Application Error
Resolution Notes: Expiry date check was skipping medications with null lot numbers. Fixed null handling in expiry validation logic via vendor hotfix. Expiry alerts tested across multiple medication types and confirmed working.

Short Description: ePIMS upgrade failed, application not starting
Label: ePIMS Patching Issue
Resolution Notes: Upgrade package failed midway due to insufficient disk space on app server. Rolled back to previous version, cleared 30GB of space, and re-ran upgrade. Application started successfully on upgraded version.

Short Description: ePIMS features missing after version upgrade
Label: ePIMS Patching Issue
Resolution Notes: Post-upgrade configuration migration script had skipped certain module settings. Re-ran configuration migration with corrected script. Missing features restored and validated by super users.

Short Description: ePIMS hotfix causing prescription module to crash
Label: ePIMS Patching Issue
Resolution Notes: Hotfix introduced a regression in prescription validation logic. Rolled back hotfix on production. Vendor provided corrected patch tested in UAT environment before re-deployment. Prescription module stable.

Short Description: ePIMS database migration script failed during upgrade
Label: ePIMS Patching Issue
Resolution Notes: Schema migration script timed out on a large medication_history table. Ran migration in batched mode during off-peak hours. All schema changes applied successfully and application verified post-migration.

Short Description: ePIMS not loading on pharmacy workstation
Label: ePIMS Client Issue
Resolution Notes: Workstation Java runtime version was incompatible with updated ePIMS client. Uninstalled old JRE, installed vendor-certified Java version, and cleared browser cache. ePIMS loaded successfully on workstation.

Short Description: ePIMS client freezing on dispensing screen
Label: ePIMS Client Issue
Resolution Notes: Client freeze was caused by a memory leak in the dispensing module UI component. Applied vendor-supplied client patch. Tested dispensing workflow across 10 workstations without recurrence of freeze.

Short Description: ePIMS not displaying correctly on clinical tablet
Label: ePIMS Client Issue
Resolution Notes: ePIMS responsive layout was broken on tablet screen resolution. Browser zoom level had been manually changed. Reset zoom to 100% and locked zoom setting via GPO for tablet device group. Display corrected.

Short Description: ePIMS smart card authentication not working at nursing station
Label: ePIMS Access Issue
Resolution Notes: Smart card reader driver was outdated on nursing station PC. Updated driver and middleware software. Smart card authentication tested and confirmed working with ePIMS at all nursing stations on the ward.

Short Description: ePIMS medication cabinet integration failing
Label: ePIMS Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: Communication between ePIMS and automated dispensing cabinet (ADC) stopped due to an IP change on the ADC device. Updated ADC IP address in ePIMS cabinet integration settings. Dispensing transactions resuming correctly.

Short Description: ePIMS showing stale inventory counts
Label: ePIMS Data Issue
Resolution Notes: Inventory sync job between ePIMS and warehouse had not run for 48 hours due to a failed service. Restarted inventory sync service, triggered manual sync, and confirmed job scheduling restored.

Short Description: ePIMS prescription history not accessible for patient
Label: ePIMS Data Issue
Resolution Notes: Patient prescription history was associated with a duplicate MRN created during registration. Merged duplicate MRN records under master patient index. Full prescription history now visible under correct patient record.

Short Description: ePIMS auto-substitution not working for generic drugs
Label: ePIMS Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Generic substitution rules were not active for newly added drug classes. Configured auto-substitution rules for affected drug classes in formulary settings. Substitution tested and confirmed working in dispensing workflow.

Short Description: ePIMS not generating discharge medication summary
Label: ePIMS Workflow Issue
Resolution Notes: Discharge summary generation was failing due to a missing template reference after a system upgrade. Restored template and updated workflow reference. Discharge medication summaries generating correctly for all patient types.

Short Description: ePIMS patient weight not pulling into dose calculator
Label: ePIMS Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: Patient weight data from nursing documentation system not flowing to ePIMS due to interface mapping error. Corrected weight field mapping in integration configuration. Dose calculator now pulling patient weight in real time.

Short Description: ePIMS not alerting on high-risk medication order
Label: ePIMS Application Error
Resolution Notes: High-risk medication alert rule had a logic error causing it to skip orders above a threshold. Corrected rule condition in ePIMS clinical decision support module. Alerts validated for 15 high-risk medication scenarios.

Short Description: ePIMS search returning no results for patient name
Label: ePIMS Application Error
Resolution Notes: Patient search index had become corrupt after a database failover. Rebuilt patient search index from master patient table. Patient search returning accurate results within expected response time.

Short Description: ePIMS unable to process bulk medication orders
Label: ePIMS Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Bulk order processing job was timing out for orders exceeding 200 items. Optimized bulk order processing to use batch commits of 50 records. Bulk orders up to 1000 items now processing successfully.

Short Description: ePIMS drug cost information not displaying
Label: ePIMS Data Issue
Resolution Notes: Drug cost data feed from procurement system had stopped due to an expired API key. Renewed API key in ePIMS integration settings. Drug cost information populated after next scheduled sync.

Short Description: ePIMS not saving pharmacist notes on order review
Label: ePIMS Application Error
Resolution Notes: Pharmacist notes field was saving to a deprecated database column that was no longer read by the application. Data mapped to correct column in updated schema. Notes now saving and displaying correctly.

Short Description: ePIMS dose rounding not applying correctly
Label: ePIMS Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Dose rounding rules were misconfigured for weight-based pediatric medications. Reviewed and corrected rounding rules with clinical pharmacy team. Dose rounding validated across paediatric formulary entries.

Short Description: ePIMS patient consent form not generating
Label: ePIMS Workflow Issue
Resolution Notes: Consent form template had a broken reference to a renamed data field. Updated template field mapping and republished template. Consent forms generating correctly and printing to ward printer.

Short Description: ePIMS not showing real-time bed status
Label: ePIMS Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: Bed management system interface had stopped sending ADT A01 admission messages to ePIMS. Restarted interface engine and flushed stale message queue. Real-time bed status updates confirmed in ePIMS.

Short Description: ePIMS pharmacy queue not updating in real time
Label: ePIMS Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: WebSocket connection used for real-time queue updates was dropping due to a network timeout setting. Adjusted WebSocket keep-alive interval in ePIMS server configuration. Real-time queue updates confirmed stable.

Short Description: ePIMS unable to process insurance pre-authorization
Label: ePIMS Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: Pre-authorization API endpoint had changed after insurer system upgrade. Updated endpoint URL and authentication headers in ePIMS payer integration settings. Pre-authorization requests processing successfully.

Short Description: ePIMS clinical trial medication tracking not working
Label: ePIMS Workflow Issue
Resolution Notes: Clinical trial module had an expired license key disabling tracking functionality. Obtained and applied updated license key from vendor. Clinical trial medication tracking restored and validated with research pharmacy.

Short Description: ePIMS not capturing pharmacist override reason
Label: ePIMS Compliance Issue
Resolution Notes: Override reason mandatory field was not enforcing entry before allowing order progression. Fixed form validation logic via vendor patch. Override reason now mandatory and captured in audit trail for all override events.

Short Description: ePIMS formulary restriction alerts not showing for non-formulary drugs
Label: ePIMS Application Error
Resolution Notes: Formulary restriction logic was not evaluating correctly for drugs added in the last quarterly update. Refreshed formulary restriction cache and validated alert logic against test formulary dataset. Alerts firing correctly.

Short Description: ePIMS not tracking partial dispensing of medications
Label: ePIMS Workflow Issue
Resolution Notes: Partial dispense workflow was incorrectly closing the order on first partial completion. Corrected order status logic to keep order open until full quantity dispensed. Partial dispensing tracked accurately end-to-end.

Short Description: ePIMS HIPAA audit report failing to export
Label: ePIMS Compliance Issue
Resolution Notes: HIPAA audit export was hitting a row limit of 10,000 records in the export function. Implemented paginated export for audit reports. Full HIPAA audit data now exportable in multiple paginated files.

Short Description: ePIMS not applying weight-based dosing for paediatric patients
Label: ePIMS Application Error
Resolution Notes: Paediatric dosing module was not activating for patients under 12 years when age was stored in months rather than years. Fixed age unit handling in dosing engine. Weight-based dosing correctly applying for all paediatric patient records.

Short Description: ePIMS alert fatigue — too many low priority alerts firing
Label: ePIMS Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Alert thresholds were set too broadly, generating excessive low-priority notifications. Worked with clinical pharmacy leads to recalibrate alert thresholds. Alert volume reduced by 45% while maintaining coverage of clinically significant events.

Short Description: ePIMS cannot connect to remote pharmacy branch
Label: ePIMS Network Issue
Resolution Notes: VPN tunnel between main hospital and remote pharmacy branch had dropped. IT network team restored VPN tunnel and verified ePIMS connectivity at remote site. Remote branch pharmacists confirmed full system access.

Short Description: ePIMS two-factor authentication not prompting users
Label: ePIMS Access Issue
Resolution Notes: 2FA policy had been inadvertently disabled for the pharmacy user group during an AD group policy update. Re-enabled MFA enforcement for pharmacy group in Azure AD. 2FA prompting correctly for all pharmacy staff.

Short Description: ePIMS not displaying IV admixture instructions
Label: ePIMS Data Issue
Resolution Notes: IV admixture instructions were stored in a field not mapped to the dispensing view. Updated field mapping in dispensing display configuration. IV admixture instructions now visible to pharmacists during order review.

Short Description: ePIMS medication reconciliation screen not loading
Label: ePIMS Application Error
Resolution Notes: Medication reconciliation module failed to load due to an unhandled exception when patient had over 50 active medications. Added pagination and exception handling to reconciliation module. Screen loads correctly for all patient medication volumes.

Short Description: ePIMS not flagging duplicate therapy orders
Label: ePIMS Application Error
Resolution Notes: Duplicate therapy detection was not running for orders placed through the fast-track ordering workflow. Extended duplicate therapy check to cover all ordering pathways. Duplicates now detected regardless of order entry method.

Short Description: ePIMS dispensing history report taking over 10 minutes
Label: ePIMS Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Report query was performing full table scans on a 50-million-row dispensing history table. Added composite index on patient_id and dispensing_date columns. Report now runs in under 90 seconds.

Short Description: ePIMS drug interaction severity levels not displaying correctly
Label: ePIMS Data Issue
Resolution Notes: Severity level mapping table had incorrect codes after a drug database vendor update. Corrected severity code mapping in ePIMS drug interaction configuration. Severity levels displaying accurately for all interaction types.

Short Description: ePIMS not sending low stock alerts to pharmacy manager
Label: ePIMS Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Low stock notification rule had an incorrect recipient email address. Updated recipient list in ePIMS inventory alerting configuration. Test alert sent and confirmed received by pharmacy manager.

Short Description: ePIMS mobile app crashing on medication verification
Label: ePIMS Client Issue
Resolution Notes: Mobile app crash traced to an unhandled null value in barcode scan response. Vendor released mobile app patch 3.4.1 addressing null handling. Patch deployed via MDM to all pharmacy mobile devices. Verification workflow stable.

Short Description: ePIMS not recording time of medication administration
Label: ePIMS Workflow Issue
Resolution Notes: Administration time field was defaulting to midnight instead of capturing actual time. Fixed default value logic in MAR administration entry form. Administration time now capturing correctly from device system clock.

Short Description: ePIMS system clock mismatch causing order timestamp errors
Label: ePIMS Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: ePIMS application server time had drifted 8 minutes from NTP source. Reconfigured Windows Time Service on application server to sync with domain NTP hierarchy. Timestamps now accurate and consistent across all ePIMS records.

Short Description: BGP neighbor stuck in Active state on Cisco router
Label: BGP Peering Issue
Resolution Notes: BGP neighbor was unable to establish TCP session due to ACL blocking port 179. Identified and updated ACL to permit BGP traffic between peers. Neighbor transitioned to Established state after ACL correction.

Short Description: BGP session dropping repeatedly between core routers
Label: BGP Peering Issue
Resolution Notes: BGP hold timer expiring due to high CPU on Cisco router causing keepalives to be missed. Identified a route processing storm. Applied route dampening and increased BGP keepalive timers. Session stabilized.

Short Description: BGP peer not forming after router replacement
Label: BGP Peering Issue
Resolution Notes: New router had incorrect BGP neighbor IP configured. Verified peer IP from network documentation and corrected neighbor statement in BGP config. Peering established successfully after configuration fix.

Short Description: eBGP session flapping between AS boundaries
Label: BGP Peering Issue
Resolution Notes: eBGP session flapping due to MTU mismatch on the interconnect link causing TCP fragmentation. Aligned MTU settings on both ends of the link and enabled TCP MSS clamping. eBGP session stable after changes.

Short Description: BGP neighbor showing Idle state, no connection attempts
Label: BGP Peering Issue
Resolution Notes: BGP neighbor was administratively shut down from a previous maintenance window. Removed shutdown command from neighbor statement and cleared BGP session. Neighbor moved to Established state.

Short Description: BGP multihop session not establishing to remote peer
Label: BGP Peering Issue
Resolution Notes: TTL value was set to 1 for eBGP multihop session requiring TTL of 2. Corrected ebgp-multihop value in neighbor configuration. BGP session established successfully with remote peer.

Short Description: BGP session not recovering after WAN link failure
Label: BGP Peering Issue
Resolution Notes: BFD was not configured on the BGP session, causing slow failure detection. Enabled BFD for BGP on both peers and tuned BFD timers to 300ms intervals. BGP now detects link failures within 1 second and reconverges rapidly.

Short Description: BGP neighbor authentication failing on Cisco IOS-XE
Label: BGP Peering Issue
Resolution Notes: MD5 authentication password mismatch between BGP peers. Verified correct password with network team and updated neighbor password on both sides. BGP session authenticated and established correctly.

Short Description: iBGP peers not exchanging routes within AS
Label: BGP Peering Issue
Resolution Notes: iBGP full mesh was broken after a new router was added without configuring it as a neighbor with all existing iBGP peers. Added missing neighbor statements and configured route-reflector client to simplify future scaling. Routes exchanged correctly.

Short Description: BGP session reset after Cisco IOS upgrade
Label: BGP Peering Issue
Resolution Notes: IOS upgrade changed default BGP timer values causing hold timer mismatch. Explicitly configured matching keepalive and hold timers on both peers. BGP session re-established and has been stable since upgrade.

Short Description: BGP not advertising default route to downstream peers
Label: BGP Route Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: Default-originate was configured but conditional route map was referencing a prefix not in the routing table. Updated route map to reference a valid prefix. Default route now advertising correctly to all downstream peers.

Short Description: BGP advertising incorrect prefix length to ISP
Label: BGP Route Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: A /24 prefix was being summarized to a /16 during advertisement due to an overly broad aggregate-address statement. Corrected aggregate-address with summary-only and added explicit network statements. Correct prefix lengths now advertised.

Short Description: BGP route not being redistributed from OSPF
Label: BGP Route Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: Redistribution from OSPF into BGP was configured but a route map was filtering the specific prefix. Updated route map permit statement to include the missing prefix range. Route now redistributed and visible in BGP table.

Short Description: BGP outbound route filter not working as expected
Label: BGP Route Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: Outbound prefix-list was applied in the wrong direction. Moved prefix-list from inbound to outbound neighbor statement and cleared BGP session. Outbound route filtering confirmed working via BGP table verification.

Short Description: BGP community not being passed to peer
Label: BGP Route Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: send-community was not configured on the neighbor statement. Added send-community both to the neighbor configuration. BGP communities now passing correctly and verified with show bgp neighbors received-routes.

Short Description: BGP local preference not influencing path selection
Label: BGP Route Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: Local preference was being set in a route map but route map was not applied to the correct neighbor inbound. Corrected route map application on neighbor statement. Local preference now influencing BGP best path selection as intended.

Short Description: BGP MED not being honored by upstream provider
Label: BGP Route Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: Upstream provider was not configured to honor MED from our AS. Coordinated with ISP NOC to enable MED comparison. Verified traffic engineering via MED is now working correctly using traceroute path verification.

Short Description: BGP route map not matching on AS path
Label: BGP Route Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: AS path access list regex was incorrectly written, failing to match intended AS paths. Corrected regex in ip as-path access-list and verified matches using show ip bgp regexp. Route map now matching and applying policy correctly.

Short Description: Unwanted BGP routes being accepted from peer
Label: BGP Route Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: No inbound prefix-list was configured on the external BGP peer allowing all routes to be accepted. Created and applied inbound prefix-list limiting accepted prefixes to agreed address space. BGP table cleaned up after session reset.

Short Description: BGP aggregate route causing routing black hole
Label: BGP Route Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: Aggregate address was being advertised without the suppress-map, replacing specific routes. Added suppress-map to retain specific route advertisements alongside aggregate. Routing verified end-to-end with no packet loss.

Short Description: BGP route table not converging after upstream change
Label: BGP Convergence Issue
Resolution Notes: BGP route refresh was not completing due to a high volume of updates from upstream. Applied inbound soft reconfiguration and tuned BGP update delay timers. Route table converged fully within 3 minutes of upstream change.

Short Description: BGP best path changing frequently causing instability
Label: BGP Convergence Issue
Resolution Notes: BGP route dampening was not configured, allowing flapping routes to continuously affect best path selection. Configured BGP route dampening with appropriate half-life and reuse thresholds. Path instability eliminated.

Short Description: Missing BGP routes after network failover
Label: BGP Convergence Issue
Resolution Notes: Failover router had BGP maximum-prefix limit configured too low, causing session to drop when full table received. Adjusted maximum-prefix threshold and added warning-only flag. Full BGP table accepted and routes restored.

Short Description: BGP convergence slow after core link failure
Label: BGP Convergence Issue
Resolution Notes: BGP was relying on hold timer expiry (90 seconds) to detect link failure. Implemented BFD with BGP fallover and tuned detection timers. Convergence time reduced from 90 seconds to under 2 seconds after link failure.

Short Description: BGP table showing stale routes after peer reset
Label: BGP Convergence Issue
Resolution Notes: BGP graceful restart was enabled but the restart timer was set too high, keeping stale routes for 480 seconds. Reduced restart timer to 120 seconds and configured stale-path timer appropriately. Stale routes cleared promptly after session recovery.

Short Description: BGP max-prefix limit exceeded, session dropped
Label: BGP Prefix Issue
Resolution Notes: ISP sent more prefixes than the configured maximum-prefix threshold causing the session to tear down. Reviewed expected prefix count with ISP, adjusted maximum-prefix limit with a 10% buffer, and re-established session. BGP session stable.

Short Description: BGP not installing received prefix into routing table
Label: BGP Prefix Issue
Resolution Notes: Received prefix was being filtered by an inbound distribute-list that was applied but undocumented. Audited all inbound filters on the neighbor, removed obsolete distribute-list, and cleared the BGP session. Prefix now installed in RIB.

Short Description: Bogon prefixes appearing in BGP table from peer
Label: BGP Prefix Issue
Resolution Notes: Peer was advertising RFC1918 and other bogon prefixes without filtering. Applied inbound prefix-list blocking all known bogon ranges per IANA guidelines. BGP table cleaned of all bogon entries after session soft-reset.

Short Description: BGP prefix flapping causing repeated route withdrawals
Label: BGP Prefix Issue
Resolution Notes: Upstream interface instability caused repeated prefix withdrawals and re-advertisements. Enabled BGP route dampening for the affected peer. Configured penalty thresholds to suppress route after 5 flaps. Network stability restored.

Short Description: Specific BGP prefix not reachable despite being in table
Label: BGP Prefix Issue
Resolution Notes: Prefix was in BGP table but not installed in RIB due to a higher admin distance IGP route for the same prefix. Adjusted BGP administrative distance for the specific prefix using distance bgp command. Prefix installed and traffic forwarding correctly.

Short Description: BGP router-id conflict causing session instability
Label: BGP Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Two routers had the same BGP router-id causing session conflicts. Explicitly configured unique router-ids using bgp router-id command on both devices. Conflict resolved and BGP sessions established correctly.

Short Description: BGP confederation not routing correctly between sub-AS
Label: BGP Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Confederation peer AS numbers were missing from the bgp confederation peers statement on one router. Added missing confederation peer AS to configuration. Inter-sub-AS routing restored and full mesh verified.

Short Description: BGP route reflector not propagating routes to clients
Label: BGP Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Route reflector cluster-id was misconfigured creating a routing loop prevention issue. Corrected cluster-id to be consistent across all route reflectors in the cluster. Client routes now propagating correctly throughout the iBGP topology.

Short Description: BGP next-hop not reachable for received routes
Label: BGP Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: iBGP was not resolving next-hop because next-hop-self was not configured on the border router. Added neighbor next-hop-self to all iBGP peer statements on border routers. Next-hop now reachable and routes installing in RIB.

Short Description: BGP synchronization causing routes to be withheld
Label: BGP Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: BGP synchronization was enabled on legacy IOS causing routes not in IGP to be withheld. Disabled synchronization using no synchronization command. Routes now advertising correctly to iBGP peers without IGP dependency.

Short Description: BGP soft reconfiguration not working after policy change
Label: BGP Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Soft reconfiguration inbound was not enabled, requiring hard reset to apply inbound policy changes. Enabled soft-reconfiguration inbound on all eBGP peers. Policy changes can now be applied with clear ip bgp soft without dropping sessions.

Short Description: BGP peer group configuration not applying to new neighbor
Label: BGP Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: New neighbor was not added to the existing peer group, missing all inherited policy configurations. Added neighbor to correct peer group using neighbor peer-group command. All peer group policies now applying to new neighbor.

Short Description: BGP weight not set correctly for preferred path
Label: BGP Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Weight was configured in a route map but route map was applied outbound instead of inbound. Moved route map to inbound direction on the neighbor statement. BGP weight now influencing path selection correctly for preferred upstream.

Short Description: BGP session hijacking attempt detected on Cisco router
Label: BGP Security Issue
Resolution Notes: Syslog alerts showed unauthorized BGP open messages from unknown IP. Applied strict BGP TTL security (GTSM) using neighbor ttl-security hops 1. Configured ACL to permit BGP only from known peer IPs. No further unauthorized BGP attempts detected.

Short Description: BGP prefix hijack detected, traffic being misdirected
Label: BGP Security Issue
Resolution Notes: More specific prefix being advertised by unauthorized AS causing traffic diversion. Coordinated with upstream ISP to apply ROA validation via RPKI. Implemented inbound prefix filtering to reject unauthorized more-specific advertisements. Traffic path restored.

Short Description: BGP MD5 authentication causing intermittent session resets
Label: BGP Security Issue
Resolution Notes: MD5 key had a trailing space character causing periodic authentication failures. Removed and reconfigured MD5 key carefully on both peers ensuring no whitespace. BGP sessions stable with authentication confirmed via debug ip bgp.

Short Description: BGP session vulnerable to TCP RST attack
Label: BGP Security Issue
Resolution Notes: BGP session not protected against TCP RST injection. Implemented BGP TTL security (GTSM) and enabled MD5 authentication on all eBGP sessions. Applied ACL limiting TCP 179 to known peer addresses only. Session security hardened.

Short Description: ISP BGP session down, internet connectivity lost
Label: BGP WAN Issue
Resolution Notes: ISP BGP session dropped due to ISP-side maintenance without prior notification. Contacted ISP NOC who restored BGP session after resolving their internal issue. Implemented monitoring alert for BGP session state changes to detect future outages faster.

Short Description: Dual ISP BGP failover not working correctly
Label: BGP WAN Issue
Resolution Notes: Secondary ISP BGP session was established but local preference was equal to primary, causing unpredictable path selection. Set local preference 150 for primary ISP and 100 for secondary. Traffic now consistently using primary path with clean failover to secondary.

Short Description: BGP full internet routing table causing router memory issues
Label: BGP WAN Issue
Resolution Notes: Cisco router memory exhausted after accepting full BGP table from both ISPs. Applied inbound prefix filter to accept only default route and specific prefixes from ISPs. Memory utilization reduced to 45% and router performance normalized.

Short Description: BGP asymmetric routing causing firewall issues
Label: BGP WAN Issue
Resolution Notes: Inbound and outbound traffic taking different ISP paths confusing stateful firewall. Used BGP MED on inbound and local preference on outbound to align traffic paths through same ISP link. Asymmetric routing eliminated and firewall sessions stable.

Short Description: BGP traffic not failing over to secondary ISP after primary outage
Label: BGP WAN Issue
Resolution Notes: Secondary ISP BGP session was in Idle state due to a firewall rule blocking TCP 179 to secondary peer. Updated firewall policy to permit BGP to secondary ISP peer. Failover tested by dropping primary session — traffic switched to secondary within 30 seconds.

Short Description: BGP flap causing intermittent packet loss on MPLS WAN
Label: BGP WAN Issue
Resolution Notes: BGP session over MPLS was flapping due to QoS misconfiguration deprioritising BGP keepalive packets. Reclassified BGP traffic (TCP 179) to high priority queue on all WAN interfaces. BGP session stable and no further packet loss observed.

Short Description: BGP state change alerts not triggering in monitoring system
Label: BGP Monitoring Issue
Resolution Notes: SNMP trap for BGP peer state change (bgpBackwardTransition OID) was not configured on Cisco routers. Configured snmp-server enable traps bgp on all core routers and verified traps received in monitoring platform. BGP state change alerts now operational.

Short Description: BGP route count not visible in network monitoring dashboard
Label: BGP Monitoring Issue
Resolution Notes: SNMP polling for BGP prefix count MIB was using incorrect OID. Updated monitoring platform with correct cbgpPeerAddrFamilyTable OID. BGP prefix counts now displaying correctly for all peers in dashboard.

Short Description: Syslog not capturing BGP neighbor state changes
Label: BGP Monitoring Issue
Resolution Notes: Logging level for BGP was set to warnings only, missing informational state change messages. Updated logging level to informational for BGP process on all routers using logging trap informational. BGP neighbor state changes now visible in syslog.

Short Description: Apigee API proxy deployment failing with error
Label: Apigee Deployment Issue
Resolution Notes: Proxy deployment failed due to an invalid policy configuration referencing a non-existent key-value map. Corrected KVM reference in the policy XML and redeployed. Deployment succeeded and proxy verified functional in all environments.

Short Description: Apigee proxy returning 500 error after deployment
Label: Apigee Deployment Issue
Resolution Notes: Post-deployment 500 errors traced to a JavaScript callout policy with a syntax error introduced during refactoring. Identified faulty script using Apigee trace tool. Corrected JavaScript and redeployed. Proxy returning 200 responses correctly.

Short Description: Apigee proxy not deploying to production environment
Label: Apigee Deployment Issue
Resolution Notes: Deployment was blocked by an environment-level deployment restriction policy requiring two approvers. Completed approval workflow in Apigee management console. Proxy deployed to production successfully after approvals obtained.

Short Description: Apigee API proxy revision rollback required after bad release
Label: Apigee Deployment Issue
Resolution Notes: New proxy revision introduced a breaking change affecting downstream consumers. Used Apigee management API to undeploy current revision and redeploy previous stable revision. Consumer traffic restored within 5 minutes of rollback.

Short Description: Apigee proxy bundle import failing with validation error
Label: Apigee Deployment Issue
Resolution Notes: Proxy bundle ZIP contained a malformed apiproxy/policies directory structure. Restructured bundle according to Apigee proxy bundle specification and re-imported. Bundle imported and deployed without errors.

Short Description: Apigee OAuth token validation failing for API consumers
Label: Apigee Security Issue
Resolution Notes: OAuth token validation policy was referencing a deleted API product. Recreated API product with correct scopes and updated token validation policy. OAuth tokens now validating correctly for all consumers.

Short Description: Apigee API key not being accepted by proxy
Label: Apigee Security Issue
Resolution Notes: API key verification policy was checking wrong header name after a client contract change. Updated VerifyAPIKey policy to read key from correct header. API key authentication working correctly after policy update and redeployment.

Short Description: Apigee JWT verification failing intermittently
Label: Apigee Security Issue
Resolution Notes: JWT clock skew between issuer and Apigee was causing token rejections. Configured clock skew tolerance of 60 seconds in the VerifyJWT policy. Intermittent JWT failures eliminated after policy update.

Short Description: Apigee OAuth2 access token expiring too quickly
Label: Apigee Security Issue
Resolution Notes: Token expiry was set to 300 seconds in the GenerateAccessToken policy. Coordinated with API product owner to extend expiry to 3600 seconds per consumer agreement. Token TTL updated and confirmed with consumer team.

Short Description: Apigee CORS policy blocking legitimate API requests
Label: Apigee Security Issue
Resolution Notes: CORS policy was missing the consumer application origin in the allowed origins list. Added the missing origin to the CORS policy configuration and redeployed proxy. CORS preflight and actual requests completing successfully from consumer application.

Short Description: Apigee mTLS client certificate authentication failing
Label: Apigee Security Issue
Resolution Notes: Client certificate chain was not trusted because the intermediate CA certificate was missing from Apigee truststore. Uploaded intermediate CA certificate to the target server truststore in Apigee. mTLS handshake completing successfully.

Short Description: Apigee API proxy exposed without authentication policy
Label: Apigee Security Issue
Resolution Notes: Security audit identified a proxy deployed to production without an API key or OAuth policy. Immediately added VerifyAPIKey policy to the proxy, issued API keys to legitimate consumers, and redeployed. Unauthorized access blocked.

Short Description: Apigee quota policy blocking valid API requests
Label: Apigee Quota Issue
Resolution Notes: Quota limit was set too low for a consumer whose usage had legitimately grown. Reviewed usage analytics in Apigee and updated quota in the API product from 1000 to 10000 requests per day. Consumer API calls succeeding without quota errors.

Short Description: Apigee spike arrest policy rejecting traffic during peak
Label: Apigee Quota Issue
Resolution Notes: SpikeArrest policy was configured too aggressively at 10 requests per second. Reviewed traffic analytics and adjusted spike arrest to 100 requests per second to match legitimate peak load. Peak traffic handling without false throttling.

Short Description: Apigee API response times degraded across all proxies
Label: Apigee Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Message processor JVM heap was near capacity causing frequent garbage collection pauses. Increased JVM heap allocation on all message processors and tuned GC settings. API response times improved from 4 seconds to under 300ms after restart.

Short Description: Apigee management API calls timing out
Label: Apigee Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Apigee management server was under heavy load from a bulk proxy import script running in CI/CD pipeline. Added rate limiting to the CI/CD pipeline's API calls and scheduled bulk operations during off-peak hours. Management API timeouts resolved.

Short Description: Apigee analytics data showing significant processing lag
Label: Apigee Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Analytics processing pipeline was backed up due to a Postgres database connection pool exhaustion on the analytics server. Increased connection pool size and optimized analytics flush interval. Analytics data lag reduced from 4 hours to under 10 minutes.

Short Description: Apigee proxy latency increasing after target backend slowdown
Label: Apigee Performance Issue
Resolution Notes: Target backend response times had increased to 30 seconds causing Apigee I/O timeout. Configured appropriate io.timeout.millis on the target endpoint and added a ServiceCallout with circuit breaker logic. Consumers now receiving timeout error responses rather than hanging.

Short Description: Apigee target server connection refused error
Label: Apigee Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: Target server had been decommissioned but was still referenced in the proxy TargetEndpoint. Updated target server configuration in Apigee to point to the replacement backend host and port. Proxy connecting to backend and returning responses correctly.

Short Description: Apigee SSL handshake failing to backend target server
Label: Apigee Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: Backend server's TLS certificate had been renewed with a new CA not trusted by Apigee. Uploaded the new CA certificate to the Apigee truststore for the target server. TLS handshake completing successfully and backend connectivity restored.

Short Description: Apigee proxy not passing custom headers to backend
Label: Apigee Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: An AssignMessage policy was removing all headers before the target request. Corrected the AssignMessage policy to explicitly preserve required custom headers. Verified headers reaching backend using Apigee trace and target server access logs.

Short Description: Apigee load balancing not distributing traffic evenly
Label: Apigee Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: Target server load balancer was configured with weighted round-robin but one server had weight set to 0. Updated server weight to equal values. Traffic now distributing evenly across all backend instances as verified in Apigee analytics.

Short Description: Apigee health check failing for target server pool
Label: Apigee Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: Health check endpoint on backend required an API key in the request header which was not configured. Added required API key header to Apigee health check configuration. Health checks passing and unhealthy server correctly excluded from rotation.

Short Description: Apigee not retrying failed backend requests
Label: Apigee Integration Issue
Resolution Notes: Retry on connect failure was disabled in the target endpoint HTTPTargetConnection. Enabled retryEnabled and set retryCount to 3 for transient connection failures. Backend retry working correctly on transient failures without impacting consumers.

Short Description: Apigee JSON to XML policy corrupting response body
Label: Apigee Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: JSONToXML policy was applying incorrect namespace mappings causing malformed XML. Corrected namespace configuration in policy and added validation step using XSL. Transformed XML responses verified well-formed by consumer application.

Short Description: Apigee ExtractVariables policy not parsing JSON body
Label: Apigee Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: ExtractVariables policy was set to extract from header instead of request body. Updated JSONPath source in policy to reference request.content. Variables now correctly extracted and available for downstream policy processing.

Short Description: Apigee ServiceCallout policy timing out to internal service
Label: Apigee Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: ServiceCallout timeout was set to default 55 seconds but internal service had a slow initialization. Added a connection warmup and reduced ServiceCallout timeout to 5 seconds with appropriate fault rule handling. Consumer experience improved with fast failure response.

Short Description: Apigee RaiseFault policy not returning correct error format
Label: Apigee Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: RaiseFault policy was returning plain text instead of JSON error payload expected by consumers. Updated RaiseFault policy to return JSON-formatted error body with correct Content-Type header. Error responses now consistent with API contract.

Short Description: Apigee cache policy not caching responses as expected
Label: Apigee Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: ResponseCache policy was using a dynamic cache key that resolved to an empty string for certain requests. Fixed cache key expression to include stable request path and query parameters. Response caching now working correctly and reducing backend load by 40%.

Short Description: Apigee MessageLogging policy dropping log entries
Label: Apigee Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: MessageLogging syslog target was using UDP and losing packets under high load. Changed MessageLogging policy to use TCP transport for syslog delivery. Log delivery confirmed reliable with no dropped entries under load test.

Short Description: Apigee KVM policy throwing access denied error
Label: Apigee Policy Issue
Resolution Notes: Key-value map was created at organization scope but policy was attempting to access it at environment scope. Recreated KVM at correct environment scope and updated policy reference. KVM access working correctly in all environments.

Short Description: Apigee developer portal not loading API documentation
Label: Apigee Portal Issue
Resolution Notes: OpenAPI spec uploaded to the portal had validation errors preventing rendering. Validated spec using Swagger Editor, corrected schema definition errors, and re-uploaded to portal. API documentation rendering correctly for all developer users.

Short Description: Apigee developer app registration failing
Label: Apigee Portal Issue
Resolution Notes: Developer app creation was failing due to a custom attribute validation rule requiring a field not shown on the registration form. Removed obsolete custom attribute requirement from app registration policy. Developers can now register apps successfully.

Short Description: Apigee API product not visible to developers in portal
Label: Apigee Portal Issue
Resolution Notes: API product visibility was set to private instead of public. Updated API product access level to public in Apigee management console. Product now visible and subscribable by developers on the portal.

Short Description: Apigee developer portal SSO login not working
Label: Apigee Portal Issue
Resolution Notes: SAML IdP metadata on the developer portal had expired. Exported fresh IdP metadata from identity provider and updated in Apigee portal SAML configuration. Developer portal SSO login confirmed working for all user groups.

Short Description: Apigee API product quota not reflecting in developer portal
Label: Apigee Portal Issue
Resolution Notes: Portal was caching stale API product details. Cleared portal cache and triggered re-sync of API product data from Apigee management layer. Updated quota limits now displaying correctly in developer portal app dashboard.

Short Description: Apigee environment configuration missing after org migration
Label: Apigee Configuration Issue
Resolution Notes: Several environment-level KVMs and target servers were not included in the migration export. Audited source environment configuration, exported missing resources, and imported into new organization. All proxy configurations validated post-migration.

Short Description: Apigee message processor showing out of memory errors
Label: Apigee Infrastructure Issue
Resolution Notes: Message processor heap dump analysis showed a memory leak in a custom Java callout. Identified unbounded cache object in Java code. Fixed caching logic with proper eviction policy and redeployed callout JAR. Memory usage stabilized within normal bounds.

Short Description: Apigee router not distributing traffic to all message processors
Label: Apigee Infrastructure Issue
Resolution Notes: One message processor was marked unhealthy by the Apigee router due to a stale health check failure. Restarted the message processor service, confirmed health check passing, and verified traffic distributing evenly across all processors.

Short Description: Apigee ZooKeeper quorum lost causing management API failures
Label: Apigee Infrastructure Issue
Resolution Notes: One ZooKeeper node had crashed reducing quorum below threshold. Restarted ZooKeeper service on failed node, verified quorum restored, and restarted dependent Apigee management server. Management API operations resumed normally.

Short Description: Apigee Cassandra node down causing analytics gaps
Label: Apigee Infrastructure Issue
Resolution Notes: Cassandra node had run out of disk space and stopped. Freed disk space by archiving old analytics data, restarted Cassandra, and triggered repair to catch up missed writes. Analytics gaps backfilled and node rejoined cluster successfully.

Short Description: Apigee hybrid runtime pod crashing in Kubernetes
Label: Apigee Infrastructure Issue
Resolution Notes: Apigee hybrid runtime pod was being OOMKilled due to insufficient memory limits in Helm values. Increased memory limits for runtime pod in overrides.yaml and reapplied Helm chart. Pods running stably and no further OOMKill events observed.

Short Description: Apigee API error rate alert not triggering
Label: Apigee Monitoring Issue
Resolution Notes: Alert condition in Apigee analytics was configured on the wrong environment. Moved alert rule to the production environment in Apigee monitoring settings. Triggered test error spike and confirmed alert firing and delivering notification correctly.

Short Description: Apigee custom reports not reflecting real-time traffic
Label: Apigee Monitoring Issue
Resolution Notes: Custom report was set to use hourly data aggregation instead of minute-level. Updated report configuration to use one-minute aggregation for operational visibility. Real-time traffic now reflected in custom report with under 2-minute lag.

Short Description: Apigee trace tool not capturing requests in production
Label: Apigee Monitoring Issue
Resolution Notes: Trace was limited to 10 transactions and had filled during investigation. Cleared existing trace session and started a new filtered trace targeting specific consumer app. Requests captured successfully for root cause analysis.

Short Description: Apigee latency percentile metrics missing from dashboard
Label: Apigee Monitoring Issue
Resolution Notes: Custom dashboard was querying deprecated metrics API endpoint. Updated dashboard queries to use current Apigee analytics v2 API with correct metric names. Latency percentile data now populating correctly across all dashboard panels.

Short Description: Apigee API version deprecation not communicated to consumers
Label: Apigee Lifecycle Issue
Resolution Notes: No deprecation notice had been sent before proxy v1 was scheduled for retirement. Identified all active consumer apps via Apigee analytics, sent deprecation notice with migration guide to v2, and extended v1 sunset date by 60 days. Consumer migration tracked in Apigee portal.

Short Description: Apigee proxy shared flow changes breaking multiple proxies
Label: Apigee Lifecycle Issue
Resolution Notes: A shared flow used by 12 proxies had a breaking change introduced without version control. Reverted shared flow to previous revision. Established shared flow versioning policy requiring backward-compatible changes only with major version increment for breaking changes.

Short Description: Apigee environment promotion pipeline failing in CI/CD
Label: Apigee Lifecycle Issue
Resolution Notes: CI/CD pipeline was using a deprecated Apigee management API endpoint for proxy deployment. Updated pipeline scripts to use Apigee X APIs with correct authentication via service account. Pipeline deploying proxies successfully across all environments.

Short Description: Apigee API product sunset breaking consumer integrations
Label: Apigee Lifecycle Issue
Resolution Notes: API product was decommissioned without migrating consumer apps to the replacement product. Restored deprecated product temporarily, mapped all consumer apps to new product with identical scopes, and verified integrations working before final deprecation.

Short Description: Apigee proxy not handling API versioning in URL path correctly
Label: Apigee Lifecycle Issue
Resolution Notes: Base path was not capturing the version segment, routing all versions to the same proxy revision. Implemented conditional flow routing based on URI path version prefix. Each API version now routed to the correct proxy revision independently.
